title: lithocarpus cantleyanus
intro: Lithocarpus cantleyanus, also known as the Borneo Lithocarpus or Stinkwood tree, is a species of evergreen tree belonging to the beech family (Fagaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus cantleyanus include its potential to aid in reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are typically used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
